name: EPA+DHA Oral Supplementation
summary: Oral eicosapentaenoic acid and docosahexaenoic acid supplementation used as a pro-resolving precursor strategy in chronic venous leg ulcer inflammation and wound-healing studies.
mechanism_summary: Provides EPA and DHA precursors for downstream lipid mediators and may reduce chronic wound inflammatory cytokines, neutrophil activation, and protease-heavy wound microenvironments.

open_questions: Whether EPA+DHA produces clinically meaningful wound healing beyond biomarker and wound-area trends
Whether benefits are mediated by SPM generation rather than broader omega-3 effects
Whether the completed older-adult chronic venous leg ulcer trial reports positive, null, or mixed results
